line_syntax._comment: These patterns must match src/core/tasks/task-reader.js parser regexes exactly
line_syntax.task_line: - [ ] TNNNN description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
line_syntax.task_complete: - [X] TNNNN description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
rules: Sub-lines use 2-space indent with NO dash prefix
File paths have NO backticks — plain text only
blocked_by and blocks values wrapped in square brackets
Task IDs are T followed by 4 digits: T0001
Header SLUG must be a single word matching \w+ (no hyphens in first word)
